author: Domekologe
name: Neko
short: Shows neko images and GIFs via nekos.best.
description: Shows random neko/anime images or GIFs from nekos.best. Supports categories, autocomplete, prefix & slash commands.
install_msg:
Neko cog installed! Use !neko or /neko.

This cog fetches images from an outside service (Nekos.best API).
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any personal user data.
